headline.vsl_adaptation: If you have constant ringing or buzzing in your ears, you're not alone. Over 50 million Americans suffer from tinnitus, and until now solutions have been limited. But exciting new research presented at the 2012 American Academy of Audiology Conference shows that relief may finally be possible...

lead.opening_verbatim: According to the American Tinnitus Association (ATA), over 50 million Americans suffer from Tinnitus, a constant ringing or buzzing in the ears when no external sound is present. The causes of tinnitus are unknown, and solutions have been limited. Until now!
lead.hook_mechanism: Market size (50 million) + mystery cause + 'Until now!' breakthrough
lead.transition_to_body: Exciting new research on tinnitus revealed at the 2012 American Academy of Audiology Conference

mechanism.mechanism_description: Hearing aids emit a customized and soothing masking stimulus to manage tinnitus. Multiflex Tinnitus Technology enables superior flexibility in fine-tuning a relieving noise stimulus. iPad-based Sound Point interface helps identify and communicate sound preferences. Combines hearing improvement with tinnitus relief in one device.

proof_elements.verbatim: According to the American Tinnitus Association (ATA)
over 50 million Americans suffer from Tinnitus
Exciting new research on tinnitus revealed at the 2012 American Academy of Audiology Conference

key_sections.content_verbatim: Exciting new research on tinnitus revealed at the 2012 American Academy of Audiology Conference shows that hearing aids may help manage tinnitus by emitting a customized and soothing masking stimulus.
The newly released Debut Tinnitus by Audio Sync couples the most advanced hearing technologies with brand new and long awaited tinnitus relief!

product_features: A tinnitus solution and hearing aid rolled into one
A way to customize relief for your unique tinnitus
A way to self adjust for personal preferences
Compatibility with multiple tinnitus therapy protocols
All the performance features of our high end hearing aids as well as breakthrough Tinnitus masking technology
Multiflex Tinnitus Technology - enables superior flexibility in fine-tuning a relieving noise stimulus
Sound Point helps you identify and communicate sound preferences at the fitting stage using an iPad interface

event_structure.urgency: Space is limited, so please make an appointment

offer.savings: $500 OFF on a pair of Debut Tinnitus Hearing Aids
